```skill
---
name: config-serenity
description: Configure serenity.conf and build.gradle baseline for Serenity BDD + Cucumber + Screenplay.
---

# Config Skill

## Required outcomes

- `webdriver.driver = chrome`
- `webdriver.base.url = http://localhost:3001/`
- `serenity.project.name = AUTO_FRONT_SCREENPLAY`
- Dependencies for Serenity/Cucumber/Screenplay resolved
- Gradle wrapper available
```
